name: farmlands
description: The golden fields and peaceful pastures of the Kingdom.

templates.name: Amber Wheat Field
templates.description: Rows of tall, golden wheat sway gently in the breeze. The air smells of sun-warmed earth.

templates.name: Great Windmill
templates.description: A massive stone tower capped with slowly rotating wooden sails. The interior vibrates with the sound of grinding stone.

templates.name: Irrigation Canal
templates.description: A narrow stone-lined channel carrying cool water to the thirsty crops.

templates.name: Fenced Pasture
templates.description: A quiet paddock enclosed by a sturdy wooden fence. Life is peaceful here.
